_doc: C-STAIRCASE-REVALIDATE pre-committed walk schedule (alpha). The schedule IS the hypothesis; pre-registered BEFORE the gated walk and NOT tuned to move ROC. Predecessor artifact: range_final @ commit 3c2161c.
final_10min: depth_fraction 0.0 -> most aggressive maker, bid at anchor-1 (D=1)
depth_formula: D(cell, t) = max(1, round(1 + (deep_target[cell] - 1) * depth_fraction(t)));  depth_fraction(t) = fraction at the smallest knot >= t (held between knots); t<10 -> 0.0
deep_target_source: docs/policy/range_final_<CAT>.csv final_target column (the committed deepest bid at T-240)
tail_cancel_trigger: _is_match_live volume-burst latch (live_v4.py match_live_cancel, commit 0499570) -- NOT wall-clock 2-min-before-SCHEDULED-start; delay-proof. The 2-min buffer is design intent (stop re-laying ~2min before real start); the actual cancel keys on the tape latch.
evaluation_cutoff_in_sim: fills checked while tts > onset, where onset = volume-burst latch minute (the _is_match_live proxy). No wall-clock floor.
